entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop studied for genetic variability and competition effects.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for genetic variability and competition effects.

entities.name: HY 8
entities.description: A specific variety of pigeonpea used in the intercropping experiments.

entities.name: DEVELOPMENTAL CHARACTERS
entities.description: Growth-related attributes recorded at three stages of growth.

entities.name: CANOPY STRUCTURE
entities.description: The physical arrangement of leaves and branches in sorghum genotypes.

entities.name: GENETIC BACKGROUND
entities.description: The inherited genetic makeup of the sorghum genotypes.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously on the same piece of land.

entities.name: SOLECROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing a single crop on a piece of land.

entities.name: INTER-SPECIES COMPETITION
entities.description: Competition for resources between different plant species, such as sorghum and pigeonpea.

entities.name: INTRA-SPECIES COMPETITION
entities.description: Competition for resources between individuals of the same plant species.

entities.name: PLANT TYPE CONCEPT
entities.description: A theoretical framework used to study the effect of competition on plant growth.

entities.name: RBD
entities.description: Randomized Block Design, the experimental layout used for the studies.

entities.name: KHARIF
entities.description: The autumn/monsoon cropping season in India.

relationships.description: Sorghum is subject to inter-species competition when intercropped with pigeonpea
Pigeonpea is subject to inter-species competition when intercropped with sorghum
Sorghum is subject to intra-species competition during sole cropping
Pigeonpea is subject to intra-species competition during sole cropping
Intercropping is used to represent inter-species competition
Sole cropping is used to represent intra-species competition
Sorghum genotypes were selected based on differences in canopy structure
Developmental characters of sorghum were recorded during the study
Yield characters of sorghum were recorded at maturity
Developmental characters of pigeonpea were recorded during the study
Yield characters of pigeonpea were recorded at maturity
HY 8 is a specific variety of pigeonpea
RBD was the experimental design used for sorghum trials
RBD was the experimental design used for pigeonpea trials
